# Coordinate guide вЂ” decoding `xNNNN_` names

Every file in `src/` is named `x<NNNN>_<handle>.<ext>`, where `<NNNN>` is a
four-hex **coordinate**. The first hex digit is the **bucket** (a semantic
archetype); the rest sub-addresses within it. Identity is by _role/coordinate_ вЂ”
editing a file keeps its name, so `grep`/`diff`/`git` all keep working (unlike
pure content-addressing). This is the English projection of the key; the
original bilingual sketch is archived at `docs/archive/HUMAN_2026-05-19.md`; the
glossary is canonical.

## The 8 octet axes

Buckets cycle through 8 axes; hex `8`вЂ“`F` are the **second octave** of `0`вЂ“`7`
(`8`в†’`0`, `9`в†’`1`, `A`в†’`2`, вЂ¦ `F`в†’`7`).

| Axis | Archetype                                 |
| :--: | :---------------------------------------- |
|  0   | void/null/unmanifested ground             |
|  1   | singularity/first/I-am/spike              |
|  2   | mirror/duality/dialog/reflection          |
|  3   | triangle/trinity/stable witness           |
|  4   | foundation/cardinal/framework/four-square |
|  5   | hand/action/grasp/shift                   |
|  6   | harmony/balance/hexagram/honeycomb        |
|  7   | completion/cycle-end/limit/sacred         |

## The 16 buckets

| Bucket | Archetype                                 | Octet axis |
| :----: | :---------------------------------------- | :--------: |
|   0    | void/null/unmanifested ground             |     0      |
|   1    | singularity/first/I-am/spike              |     1      |
|   2    | mirror/duality/dialog/reflection          |     2      |
|   3    | triangle/trinity/stable witness           |     3      |
|   4    | foundation/cardinal/framework/four-square |     4      |
|   5    | hand/action/grasp/shift                   |     5      |
|   6    | harmony/balance/hexagram/honeycomb        |     6      |
|   7    | completion/cycle-end/limit/sacred         |     7      |
|   8    | infinity/octave/full rotation/byte        |     0      |
|   9    | penultimate/near-closure/depth/exhaustion |     1      |
|   A    | apex/alpha/fresh-start/new-cycle          |     2      |
|   B    | build/beta/base/continuation              |     3      |
|   C    | container/cycle/see-through/perception    |     4      |
|   D    | decision/distinguish/delta/threshold      |     5      |
|   E    | emergence/edge/energy/extension           |     6      |
|   F    | frontier/final/full/pre-wrap              |     7      |

## Decoding an example

`x2F30_fqdn_resolver.ts` в†’ bucket **2** = _mirror/duality/dialog/reflection_ в†’
an organ of reflection/mapping (it resolves a name to where it lives). `x7700_*`
в†’ bucket **7** = _completion/cycle-end/limit/sacred_ (receipts: a closed cycle).
`x0001` в†’ bucket **0** = _void/null/unmanifested ground_ (the glossary: the
ground primitives).

## Why this matters

A coordinate is a **guess at where a thing belongs**, audited continuously:
`t audit` checks each organ's `hex_dipole` header has its strongest axis on its
bucket. So the names are not decoration вЂ” they are a checked claim about each
file's role in the substrate.
